name: Control Panel Settings
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts that span multiple categories or serve specialized investigative purposes.
description: Control Panel desktop settings (AutoEndTasks — hung app auto-kill), disabled Control Panel applets, and geographic locale (Geo ID).
forensic_value: AutoEndTasks=1 causes Windows to automatically terminate non-responding applications — relevant if a security tool was killed via this mechanism. Cpldontload disables specific control panel applets. Geo ID confirms system locale/region for timeline context.
